coverage_note: The bundled NRL population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from NRL visual phototransduction, auditory and vestibular hair-cell mechanics, olfactory and gustatory chemosensation, somatosensory ion channels, pain, itch, temperature, proprioception, and interoceptive sensory signaling and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000129535: NRL coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: NRL findings should be read against visual phototransduction, auditory and vestibular hair-cell mechanics, olfactory and gustatory chemosensation, somatosensory ion channels, pain, itch, temperature, proprioception, and interoceptive sensory signaling; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

NRL human-senses variation model is curated as a NRL marker for Human senses, sensory transduction, and sensory-neuron research context, Vision, hearing, balance, smell, taste, touch, pain, itch, temperature, proprioception, and interoception pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

NRL regulatory expression context model is curated as a NRL marker for Human senses, sensory transduction, and sensory-neuron research context, Vision, hearing, balance, smell, taste, touch, pain, itch, temperature, proprioception, and interoception pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
